dc_description: A rural paved road curves gently through dry golden fields under a clear blue sky. Near the center-left is a large black-and-white chevron road sign pointing left, with a small stone building with a tiled roof behind it. A larger dark building is partially visible along the right edge, and long shadows stretch across the road and grassy verge, suggesting low-angle sunlight. Distant hills line the horizon.
novel_visual_observations: The road surface has a single pale center line and a curb-like edge along the left shoulder. A few small objects or bicycles appear clustered near the chevron sign beside the stone building.
rich_context: Via Cassia, Gallina, Castiglione d'Orcia, Unione dei Comuni Amiata Val d'Orcia, Siena, Toscana, 53023, Italia
